title: Fuel Protests Cause Transport Chaos in Ireland as Iran War Spikes Prices
summary_full: The Irish government said it had called in the army after protesters blocked highways, ports and an oil refinery, causing widespread disruption.
summary_public: The Irish government said it had called in the army after protesters blocked highways, ports and an oil refinery, causing widespread disruption.
